requirements.requirement: Prevent generic Harness evidence from answering named subsystem status

requirements.requirement: Reject stale status snapshots instead of treating file-read time as observation time

governance_bootstrap.summary: Read completion, deployment, model-routing, and Red Team rules.
Read real-entrypoint verification, completion evidence, and source-of-truth rules.

verification.name: Contract safety scorer
verification.result: passed: 240 cases, 0 failures; contract safety only

verification.name: OpenClaw targeted regression suite
verification.result: passed: 106 tests; one third-party deprecation warning

verification.name: Real OpenClaw service run entrypoint stale-evidence check
verification.target: local OpenClaw service run() entrypoint with real runtime/openclaw_status.json
verification.command: OPENCLAW_VERIFIED_DELIVERY_ENABLED=true OPENCLAW_QUALITY_SHADOW_ENABLED=false .venv/bin/python -c 'from adapters.content.openclaw_agent import run; print(run(...))'
verification.result: passed: live bridge generated a fresh 2026-07-22T20:11:02 snapshot; answer separated verified DB/port/integrity checks from configured-but-live-unverified external integrations

verification.name: Mac Mini production OpenClaw run and listener
verification.target: Mac Mini production service and Slack listener launchd
verification.command: ssh macmini; run OpenClaw E2E scorer and live status run(); launchctl kickstart -k gui/UID/com.harness.slack-listener; inspect launchctl and listener log
verification.result: passed: E2E 9/9; live snapshot 2026-07-22T20:13:34 rendered grounded Korean brief; listener running PID 56186 with verified delivery and shadow enabled; Bolt app running

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with seven scoped paths, followed by three-path live-probe delta deploy
deploy.result: passed: origin/main path diff 0; backups scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260722_200942 and scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260722_201317; Mac Mini E2E and live run passed; Slack listener restarted

red_team.notes: Copilot initially blocked three rounds and found real route, semantic, and guard weaknesses; all were fixed and final verdict was clear. Claude CLI attempts hung with no output, so cross-model clear is not claimed.

residual_risk: Live Slack DM output is not yet verified after deployment.
Claude independent delta review unavailable; no cross-model red_team_clear claim.
The 9-case E2E corpus is regression evidence for known paths, not proof of universal answer quality.
If the live bridge probe fails, a stale persisted snapshot is rejected rather than used for a substantive current-status answer.
